_comment: DEPRECATED — use config/local.example.json instead. Legacy copy target: bench-hosts.local.json.

alice.label: <host A nickname>
alice.workdir: <absolute path on host A for the bench workspace>

bob.label: <host B nickname>
bob.workdir: <absolute path on host B for the bench workspace>

wan._comment: WAN is simulated inside two Docker containers on one host (Docker NET_ADMIN required). Both peers run on this single host; netem shapes the inter-container bridge.

host.label: <host nickname>
host.workdir: <absolute path on the host for the WAN workspace>
